title: [Thanatoph, Narrow Crevice]
description: Darkness huddles around, but provides no comfort as you find yourself at the bottom of a narrow crevice.  The crevice walls reach hundreds of feet above you, blotting out any light.  A massive landslide has blocked further passage through the crevice at this point.

wayto.3831: ;e while checkpaths.include?('e'); fput 'search'; move 'go fissure'; end
